## Summary
<!-- One sentence: what should this feature do? -->

## Problem it Solves
<!-- What collecting/hunting/selling problem does this address? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- How would you expect this to work? -->

## Use Case
<!-- Walk through a scenario where this feature would help:
e.g. "I'm at a garage sale and I want to..." -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Did you consider any workarounds? -->

## Priority
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Would use regularly
- [ ] Game changer for my workflow

## Additional Context
<!-- Screenshots, mockups, links to similar tools, etc. -->
